title: Municipal Digital Profile
summary: Structured digital profile system for rural municipalities.
detail: Designed and delivered standardized public profile modules to improve data availability and reporting.
extra: Focused on data integrity, modular service definitions, and cross-department visibility.

title: Inventory System
summary: Django-based stock and supplier management workflows.
detail: Implemented inventory lifecycle tracking, supplier records, and reporting for accountability.
extra: Built role-based actions and audit-ready change tracking.

title: E-Governance API
summary: REST APIs for municipal services and inter-department workflows.
detail: Built API-first architecture to reduce manual process friction and improve service response speed.
extra: Introduced stable endpoint conventions and reusable validation layers.

title: Flutter Mobile Integration
summary: Field-ready mobile application integrated with backend systems.
detail: Delivered cross-platform operations workflow for teams needing mobile-first access.
extra: Optimized request handling and offline-safe data workflows.

title: Dummy Project Alpha
summary: Prototype card for layout preview and spacing tests.
detail: Used to validate visual balance in the left column.
extra: Temporary entry to inspect tile rhythm with more cards.
